================================================================================
EVENT-DRIVEN ARCHITECTURE ANALYSIS REPORT

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
----------------------------------------
Status: 🟡 PARTIALLY FUNCTIONAL (9/12 features working)

DETAILED FINDINGS
----------------------------------------

✅ WORKING FEATURES:
- Topic exact matching
- Hash (#) wildcard patterns
- In-memory publisher/subscriber
- Domain event bridge creation
- Bridge lifecycle management
- Idempotent event processing
- Watermark-based gating
- Token bucket throttling
- Queue backpressure handling

❌ BROKEN FEATURES:
- Star (*) wildcard patterns (CRITICAL - affects routing)
- Correlation ID preservation
- Cross-stage correlation tracking

🔍 ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS:

1. TOPIC FILTERING IMPLEMENTATION BUG:
   - The match_topic function appears to have issues with '*' wildcard
   - This breaks subscriber routing in InMemoryPublisher
   - Hash (#) wildcards work, but star (*) wildcards fail

2. CASCADE EFFECT:
   - Broken topic filtering affects all downstream components
   - InMemoryPublisher can't match subscribers to topics
   - Domain event bridge depends on publisher for delivery
   - End-to-end flows fail due to routing issues
